--- Rząd k = 1 ---
y_n + h*f(n)

--- Rząd k = 2 ---
y_n + (3*h*f(n))/2 - (h*f(n - 1))/2

--- Rząd k = 3 ---
y_n + (23*h*f(n))/12 - (4*h*f(n - 1))/3 + (5*h*f(n - 2))/12

--- Rząd k = 4 ---
y_n + (55*h*f(n))/24 - (59*h*f(n - 1))/24 + (37*h*f(n - 2))/24 - (3*h*f(n - 3))/8

--- Rząd k = 5 ---
y_n + (1901*h*f(n))/720 - (1387*h*f(n - 1))/360 + (109*h*f(n - 2))/30 - (637*h*f(n - 3))/360 + (251*h*f(n - 4))/720

--- Rząd k = 6 ---
y_n + (4277*h*f(n))/1440 - (2641*h*f(n - 1))/480 + (4991*h*f(n - 2))/720 - (3649*h*f(n - 3))/720 + (959*h*f(n - 4))/480 - (95*h*f(n - 5))/288

--- Rząd k = 7 ---

--- Rząd k = 8 ---

--- Rząd k = 19 ---
